sectionSubtitle: Founded by Engineers. Driven by Innovation.
intro: OBH Software started when we were working on real industry problems during our engineering studies at the University of Galway. One of us was building compliance systems for construction, the other developing solutions for the haulage sector.
We became close through the Stanford Innovation Fellowship, started collaborating on projects, and realised we shared the same approach to building technology. That led to OBH Software.
Today we design and build practical software that helps businesses simplify operations, automate processes, and move faster.

highlights.text: Siemens Innovative Student Engineer of the Year finalists 2024 & 2025
Ireland representatives at the Global Student Entrepreneur Awards
Innovation Undergraduate of the Year Winners 2025
Student Entrepreneur of the Year finalists 2025
